groupId.description: Maven groupId / Kotlin base package (e.g. com.example)

services.description: Composed downstream services this BFF aggregates

baseUrl.description: Default base URL for the service (overridable via env)

database.description: Include Spring Data JPA + PostgreSQL + Flyway

recipes.description: Named feature recipes to include in the generated project

paginationFilterSort.description: Configuration for the pagination-filter-sort recipe (no effect unless the recipe is enabled)

defaultPageSize.description: Default `size` when the client omits it

maxPageSize.description: Hard cap applied to `size` after parsing — protects against overly large pages

auditLog.description: Configuration for the audit-log recipe (no effect unless audit-log is enabled).

actorHeader.description: Header used to resolve the acting user when no Spring Security principal is present (useful for service-to-service calls). Set to an empty string to disable header-based actor resolution.

adminEndpoint.description: Whether to scaffold the admin-only `GET /api/audit-log` controller. Disable if you don't want the BFF to expose audit data.

usersManagement.description: Configuration for the users-management recipe (no effect unless users-management is enabled)

tokenTtlMinutes.description: Lifetime of issued JWTs in minutes

defaultAdminEmail.description: Email seeded as the initial ADMIN user (dev profile only)
